title: The Royal Family Thanks the Straw Hats
description: On pages 11–14, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the royal family thanks the straw hats.
scene: The scene focuses on the royal family thanks the straw hats, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eat, drink, sing, dance and be merry!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You are ... able to read it...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I am a survivor of ohara.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Your crew have earned my trust...

summary: The Royal Family Thanks the Straw Hats. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
